subcodes.first_line: The One Friend proclaimeth: Praise be unto God! Through His divine grace thou hast attained, and in the atmosphere of His love thou art soaring [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: دوست یکتا میفرماید الحمد لله بعنایت الهی فائز شدی و در هوای محبتش طائر در سنه
subcodes.subjects: @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @knowledge; recognition of God
